title.rendered: 📌2346 Verified “Jobs in Ranchi 2025 | Salary ₹8K – ₹95K | for Students & Freshers”

content.rendered:
Job In Ranchi Salary ₹8K - ₹95K [✅ Verified ]

If you are looking for job in Ranchi, This blog will give all the information that you need to get job in Ranchi.

I am writing this blog after my own experience of visiting 500+ job sites to find best Jobs in Ranchi.

It took my 1 entire month to research about job in Ranchi. So now you don’t have to struggle to find a job in Ranchi.

With my experience, I want to say there are many fraud job and placement consultancies in Ranchi.

8 out of 10 people fall into the trap in these job consultancy. 

Before I share the job opening in Ranchi.

Let’s look at major job opening and companies that give jobs In Ranchi

Before You Apply for Job in Ranchi

During my research for writing this blog i found there are mainly 4 type of job available where companies hire in bulk.

  • Telecaller job in Ranchi
  • IT Job in Ranchi
  • Digital Marketing Job in Ranchi
  • Academic Counselor Job in Ranchi
And in my research i found there is no shortage of jobs in Ranchi. Many Hr i speak with was not able to find right candidate for the company.

Telecaller Office Job in Ranchi, Jharkhand

5k+ Active Vacancy Telecaller Office Jobs in Ranchi, Jharkhand

if you are a fresher and do not have any technical skills, tele caller job is something that you can start with. Ranchi has 5K+ active job openings in telecaller Office jobs in Ranchi.

Most of companies offer training also for fresher before finalising role. 

Salary Starts from 6K – 35K depending upon year of experience and technical knowledge.

I have found a better Telecaller Job Role for you from over 500 job sites. 

These are companies where you can easily get selected even if you are a fresher.

  Job Type: – Day Shift  / Night Shift

  • Freshers Can Apply 
  • Salary 6K – 30K
  • Experience: 0 to 1-year Any-Fields
  • Skills: – Hindi & English Mix Language, Advanced English, Good Communication Skills, Sharp Mind etc.
If you want to know more telecalling / BPO/ Call centre job opportunity in Ranchi i have another blog post you can read:
– Telecaller jobs in Ranchi
– BPO jobs in Ranchi
– Call centre jobs in Ranchi

How to apply for Telecaller Office job in Ranchi Vacancy, Jharkhand
There are multiple companies and BPO which hire for telecaller office Job in Ranchi

I am sharing direct link where you can apply for telecaller office job in Ranchi

  • Kalam Academy
  • Naukri
  • Apna
  • Job hai

IT Job in Ranchi Vacancy for Web Developers, Jharkhand

12k+ Active IT Jobs in Ranchi Vacancy for Fresher
If you are have technical degree like BCA / MCA / B.Tech / MTech you can be a software developer. 

There are many job openings for software developers in Ranchi. These companies also hire freshers. 

Even if you do not have a technical degree like BCA / MCA / BTech / MTech, you know coding you can get such job in Ranchi.

Learning coding is the best option if you are looking for a Job in Ranchi. 

If you want to learn coding, you can join Kalam Academy. 

I have found a 1000+ job for coding Job Role for you.  I have searched over 500 job sites, where you can easily get selected with basic skills.

  Job Type: – Day & Night Shift/ Work from Home/ Remote/ Work in Office

  • Freshers Can Apply 
  • Salary 12K – 80k/ Months
  • Experience: 0 to 1-year Fronted & Backend
  • Skills: – Frontend Development with HTML5, CSS and Backend Development PHP

How to apply IT Job in Ranchi Vacancy for Web Developers, Jharkhand

There are multiple IT companies that hire for backend and Fronted Developer Job in Ranchi

I am sharing direct link where you can apply for Best IT Companies job in Ranchi

  • Kalam Academy
  • LinkedIn
  • Internshala
  • Indeed

Digital Marketer Vacancy Job in Ranchi, Jharkhand

15k+ Active Job Vacancy in Ranchi For Digital Marketing

If you have just completed the course of Digital Marketing or you are doing a course, then I have brought a lot of better opportunities for you from more than 400 sites in Ranchi where you can turn your fresher career into a better experience.

I’ve selected some websites for those students where they can find internships along with jobs.

I shared job details and links to some IT companies in Ranchi where you can easily apply for jobs in Ranchi

 Job Type: – Day & Night Shift/ Work from Home/ Remote/ Work in Office

  • Freshers Can Apply 
  • Salary 5K – 60k/ Months
  • Experience: 0 to 1-year 
  • Skills: – SEO On-Page & Off-Page, Google Ads Basic Knowledge, Facebook Leads Generates, Email Marketing.

How to apply for Digital Marketing job in Ranchi Vacancy, Jharkhand
Multiple IT companies hire for Digital Marketing Jobs in Ranchi.

I am sharing direct link where you can apply for Best IT Companies job in Ranchi

  • Kalam Academy
  • Job Hai
  • SimplyHired

If You want to learn digital marketing and get these job you can join Kalam Academy

Business Developer Vacancy Job in Ranchi, Jharkhand

3k+ Active Job Vacancy in Ranchi For Business Developer

If you are a business developer and searching for jobs in Ranchi on many job sites, but not finding any job due to being a fresher, don’t worry. 

I have brought for you more than 500 job websites where you can easily apply for jobs despite being a fresher.

It has taken me more than 45 days to find these great websites for you where you can build your career.

I am sharing you job details and links of some companies in Ranchi where you can easily apply for jobs in Ranchi

 Job Type: – Day Shift

  • Freshers Can Apply 
  • Salary 5K – 60k/ Months
  • Experience: 0 to 1-year 
  • Skills: – Analytical skills, Interpersonal skills, Negotiation skills, Strategic planning Business etc.

How to apply for Business Developer job in Ranchi Vacancy, Jharkhand

There are multiple companies which hire for Business Developers Job in Ranchi

I am sharing direct link where you can apply for Best Companies job in Ranchi

  • Kalam Academy
  • Apna
  • Linkedin
  • SimplyHired

Vacancy for Academic Counselor Job in Ranchi

7k+ Active Vacancy Jobs in Ranchi For Academic Counselor
Ranchi is hub of Education for Jharkhand, Bihar, Kolkata.

So there are many educational institute in Ranchi. Hence there is huge demand for academic counselors in Ranchi.

If you are confident and want to do Academic Counselor job in Ranchi, then I have brought for you the best Counselor Job Role from more than 350 sites.

Where you can apply very easily whether you are an intern or fresher.

It has taken me more than 45 days to find these great websites for you where you can build your career.

I am sharing with you the details and links of some active job companies in Ranchi where you can easily apply for jobs in Ranchi.

Job Type: – Day Shift

  • Freshers Can Apply 
  • Salary 8K – 30K/ Months
  • Experience: 0 to 1-year 
  • Skills: – Hindi & English Mix Language, Advanced English, Good Communication Skills, Sharp Mind etc.

How to apply for Academic Counselor job in Ranchi Vacancy, Jharkhand

There are multiple companies which hire for Academic Counselor Job in Ranchi

I am sharing direct link where you can apply for Best Companies job in Ranchi

  • Kalam Academy
  • Apna
  • Linkedin
  • SimplyHired

Conclusion: Job Opportunities for Freshers in Ranchi, Jharkhand

Hope this blog have given you a clear insight about job opening in Ranchi.

It took me 2 month of research and 100+ calls to different company HR to understand job opportunity in Ranchi. 

Please share this blog with your friend on whatsapp and facebook and linkedin.

This will encourage me alot to do more.

Thanks for reading my blog post in job in ranchi.
